data.title: Coinbase's reversal delays crypto bill, leaving industry leaders to salvage it. Chances of passage now uncertain.
data.description: Key figures in the cryptocurrency industry were in a rush on Thursday to try to save the market structure bill, even though some acknowledged that its chances of being passed have decreased.

data.title: Crown Holdings recognizes facilities for sustainability efforts, announcing winners of 2025 Chairman's Sustainability Awards.
data.description: Today, Crown Holdings, Inc. revealed the recipients of its 2025 Chairman's Sustainability Awards. The company, listed as NYSE: CCK, based in Tampa, Florida, highlighted its facilities' notable progress in energy efficiency, recycling efforts, and workplace safety. The awards recognize the achievements of these facilities in advancing sustainability initiatives, with a focus on reducing environmental impact and promoting a safe and eco-friendly work environment. Through these efforts, Crown acknowledges the commitment to sustainability across its operations and the positive impact on its workforce and the environment.

data.title: Rep. Comer, farmers, and industry leaders request 2-year hemp extension in Washington for regulatory framework.
data.description: The Hemp Planting Predictability Act, introduced by Rep. James Comer (R-KY), seeks to offer farmers stability and time to develop a bipartisan regulatory framework. The legislation was announced in Washington on January 15, 2026. This act is significant for American farmers and industry professionals in the U.S., aiming to provide them with predictability for planting hemp. Its goal is to establish a responsible and bipartisan regulatory structure.

data.title: Life Time and EVEREVE launch a 15-piece women's collection combining fitness and fashion, available January 22.
data.description: Two leading companies in the wellness and fashion industries have collaborated to launch a new 15-piece women's collection that combines strength and style, designed for everyday wear. The collection was introduced on January 15, 2026, by Life Time (NYSE: LTH), a prominent healthy lifestyle brand based in Chanhassen, Minn., and EVEREVE, a top fashion company located in Edina, Minn. This collaboration aims to offer women a blend of fashion and functionality in their daily lives.

data.title: Soneil Spark unveils new premium AC chargers made in Canada with 5-year warranty. Ideal for residential and commercial use.
data.description: Designed and manufactured in Canada, the new line of residential and commercial Level 2 AC EV chargers by Soneil Spark offers durability, strength, and ease of use. These chargers come with a remarkable five-year warranty, setting an industry standard. The products provide users with maximum power and control, promising reliability. The company, based in Brampton, Ontario, introduced the line on January 15, 2026.

data.title: UOVO expands in Central Texas with acquisition of Vault Fine Art Services, enhancing art storage and logistics.
data.description: Vault Fine Art Services has recently become a part of UOVO's national platform of art storage and logistics providers. The announcement was made in Austin, Texas on January 15, 2026. UOVO, known for its top-notch services in storing and managing fine art, archives, and collectibles, has successfully acquired Vault Fine Art Services. This strategic move aims to enhance UOVO's reach and capabilities in the industry.
